databrew.dataset.input.CfnAbout: Represents information on how DataBrew can find data, in either the AWS Glue Data Catalog or Amazon S3.

databrew.dataset.input.DatabaseInputDefi.Description: Connection information for dataset input files stored in a database.

databrew.dataset.input.DataCatalogInputD.Description: The AWS Glue Data Catalog parameters for the data.

databrew.dataset.input.Metadata.Description: Contains additional resource information needed for specific datasets.

databrew.dataset.input.S3InputDefinition.Description: The Amazon S3 location where the data is stored.
